package rulecoverage

func PositiveYamlUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimes() string {
    ruleID := "yaml_unmarshal_same_payload_multiple_times"
    family := "mod"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "The same local YAML payload binding is unmarshaled into multiple targets in one function."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
